label: Configure starting pawns (xenotypes)
description: Configuration page for selecting starting pawns by xenotype. Requires the Biotech DLC.

customSummary.label: Custom summary
customSummary.description: Optional override text shown in the scenario summary for this starting pawn configuration. Translated.

xenotypeCounts.label: Xenotype counts
xenotypeCounts.description: List of xenotype and count pairs defining the mix of starting pawns by xenotype.

overrideKinds.label: Override kinds
overrideKinds.description: List of xenotype-to-pawnKind mappings that override which PawnKindDef is generated for each xenotype slot.
